notes: OpenAI develops GPT-series AI models and publishes system cards and model specifications as safety and transparency documentation.

match_nodes.description: OpenAI system cards — safety and capability documentation for GPT models

data.description: Safety and capability documentation for GPT models covering system-level safety evaluations, deployment decisions, and risk assessments.
data.notes: Documents system-level safety evaluations, deployment decisions, and risk assessments. Published for GPT-4, GPT-4o, etc.

match_nodes.description: OpenAI Model Spec — behavioral guidelines for AI models

data.description: Behavioral guidelines defining how OpenAI models should behave, including safety boundaries and default behaviors.

match_nodes.description: OpenAI Preparedness Framework — risk-category framework for frontier AI

data.description: OpenAI's framework for tracking and mitigating catastrophic risks from frontier AI models. Defines four tracked risk categories (Cybersecurity, CBRN, Persuasion, Model Autonomy) with scorecard levels and pre-deployment safeguards.
data.notes: Not a per-control catalog; closer in shape to a methodology or policy document. Filed under reference until OpenAI publishes a fuller catalog of per-category controls.
